buyer_review.buyer: Because it was originally the store's fault.
buyer_review.seller: Maintaining no negative reviews in the store is important, and this one is clearly a malicious review.

receive_apology.seller: Those who make mistakes should apologize.

refund.buyer: Because what I bought is not worth the price.
refund.seller: I don't have to make concessions for this kind of person, even though a shirt isn't expensive.

seller_review.seller: His misconduct deserves the negative review.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: 请退款，这件球衣并不是我需要的
turns.translation: Please issue a refund; this jersey is not what I need.

advisor.statement: The buyer is simply requesting a refund without any signs of conflict.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: 可是店内已经明确标出没有您要的球衣
turns.translation: But the store has clearly marked that they do not have the jersey you want.

advisor.statement: The conversation is currently calm and both parties are expressing their points clearly.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: 淘宝标题写的是科比球衣对吧？你发来的东西是你标题所写的吗？要不找平台官方客服介入看看？
turns.translation: The Taobao title says it's a Kobe jersey, right? Is what you sent consistent with your title? Maybe you should ask the platform's official customer service to intervene.

advisor.statement: There seems to be a misunderstanding about the product description and what was received.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: 可是店内明确说了没有24号，科比也不止穿过24号，请您撤销差评
turns.translation: But the store clearly stated there is no number 24, and Kobe didn't only wear number 24. Please remove the negative review.

advisor.statement: There seems to be a misunderstanding about the product description and what was delivered.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: 科比穿没穿过和我没有关系，我只关心你是否有虚假标识，是否虚假库存。你做不到就让平台官方接入，我只是想大事化小，小事化了。你没有资格要求我撤销差评
turns.translation: Whether Kobe wore it or not has nothing to do with me. I only care if you have false labeling or fake inventory. If you can't prove it, let the platform officials get involved. I just want to minimize the issue. You have no right to ask me to remove the negative review.

advisor.statement: There seems to be a misunderstanding about the product listing and the buyer's expectations.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: 你没必要用官方来吓我，我店里写的很清楚没有24号，也就没有虚假标识，反而你的恶意差评影响店面正面形象
turns.translation: There's no need to scare me with official warnings. My store clearly states there is no 24th, so there is no false labeling. Instead, your malicious negative review harms the store's reputation.

advisor.statement: The conversation is becoming heated with accusations and threats of involving official platforms.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: 你以为你偷偷改了商品标题，淘宝的后台没办法调出你的修改记录吗？
turns.translation: Do you think that by secretly changing the product title, Taobao's backend can't retrieve your modification history?

advisor.statement: The conversation is becoming heated with accusations and threats of involving official platforms.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: 我从未改过标题，我也不怕淘宝后台查看， 如果咱俩只是这样交涉的话是没有结果的
turns.translation: I have never changed the title, and I'm not afraid of Taobao's backend review. If this is the only way we negotiate, there will be no resolution.

advisor.statement: The conversation has reached a deadlock with both parties repeating their positions without progress.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: 那我也无所谓，反正差评对你店铺来说影响更大，我又不赚钱。我买家差评又有什么影响呢？
turns.translation: I don't mind either way. Negative reviews affect your store more, and I'm not making any profit. How would a bad review from me impact you?

advisor.statement: The conversation is becoming increasingly hostile with accusations and threats, indicating a need for intervention.
The conversation is heated, but the parties are still communicating without personal attacks.
